label: 91, 92 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 91, R.S. § 2083, related to purchase of goods pursuant to any Indian treaty.Section 92, R.S. § 2084, related to purchase of goods by Office of Indian Affairs.

Procurement FunctionsEffective , Procurement Division of Department of the Treasury changed to Bureau of Federal Supply by regulation issued by Secretary of the Treasury under authority of , Government Organization and Employees. Functions of Bureau of Federal Supply transferred to Administrator of General Services by section 102 of , , which was repealed and reenacted as , Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , §§ 1, 6(b), , , 1304. was amended generally by , , , and, as so amended, no longer relates to the Bureau of Federal Supply.
